creator: freebsd@get-experience.com
text:
Created attachment 177272
Build log

Port fails to build with:

> *** Error code 1


make.conf is:

> WITH_CHARSET=utf8
> WITH_COLLATION=utf8_general_ci
> DEFAULT_VERSIONS= ssl=libressl pgsql=9.5 python=3.5
